You Like What? Written by Nigel Pepperhouse www.readinga-z.com Focus Question What are some surprising foods that children like to eat?

You Like What? A Reading A-Z Level C Leveled Book Word Count: 50 Connections Writing and Art Which of the foods in the book would you try? Why? Draw a picture and write about it. Science Sort the foods from the book into different groups. Share your groups with a partner: Reading A-Z Visit wwwreadinga-z.com for thousands of books and materials.
